title: Summoner Mod
description: A mod that adds 4 bosses and 4 structures. Almost no dependencies!
body:
Adds a structure, called a pyromancer's bonfire, in the sky of the swamp biome, that has a chest in it. In that chest, there are some stone ashes, which, when held in your off-hand, it spawns a pyromancer. That pyromancer summons fireballs, and drops a pyromancer lantern with fire aspect, and can light fires.

Adds a structure, called an abandoned hut, in the forest biome, that has a chest in it. In that chest, there is a staff, which, when held in your off-hand, it spawns a summoner. That summoner summons blazes, and drops a summoner wand with fire aspect, sharpness, wind charge, and knockback.

Adds a structure, called a cabin, in the taiga biome, that has a chest in it. In that chest, there is a bowman's candle, which, when held in your off-hand, it spawns a bowman. That bowman shoots a lot of arrows, and drops a bow with flame, multishot 6, and infinty.

Adds a structure, called a ship, in the ocean, that has a chest in it. In that chest, there are is a pirate flag, which, when held in your off-hand, it spawns a pirate. That pirate has a lunge 10 spear, and drops a that spear.

If it says it's for an unknown version of minecraft, press continue, it should work on anything past 1.20.5.
